notes: Enter current available business cash in Week 1. Later weeks chain from prior ending cash.

Use expected collection week; move delayed receivables rather than duplicating them.
Exclude internal transfers unless they change cash intentionally available for operations.
Do not include reserve cash here if already included in Week 1 beginning cash.

Enter only in the week proceeds are reasonably expected to be received; do not assume claim approval.

Use for selected repair or replacement path; do not automatically include every alternative.

Ending Cash = Beginning Cash + Total Inflows - Total Outflows.
Enter the minimum cash level the owner wants to protect.
Optional amount maintained above the protected minimum.
Positive = above protected minimum; negative = below.
